However, in this case, there's no evidence supporting malicious intent.\n- The malware score should remain at 0.\n- The security risk score can stay low, reflecting the benign nature.\n\n---\n\n### Final Justification:\n- **Malware score:** 0, no malicious code or behavior detected.\n- **Obfuscated score:** 0, code is straightforward and not obfuscated.\n- **Risk score:** 0, as the code is benign, with only the embedded source map which is common and not harmful.\n\n---\n\n### **Summary:**\n- The code is a standard module re-export with an inline source map.\n- No malicious or obfuscated activity is evident.\n- The scores assigned in the reports are reasonable and should remain as is.\n\n**My estimated scores:**\n- **Malware:** 0\n- **Obfuscated:** 0\n- **Risk:** 0\n\nThis assessment aligns with the detailed analysis and the consensus across the reports.",
